Additionally, there is no reference to a “non-burn” heat sterilization process linked specifically to screw feed systems. Since option D refers to a mechanism not supported by any of the cited sources—especially given that all referenced sterilizations involve thermal processes—including mechanical claims about weight reduction and volume changes—that makes D factually unsupported among the choices.
